title: Mizoram PSC Junior Grade Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
short_info: Mizoram Public Service Commission (Mizoram PSC) Junior Grade Notification 2026 has been released on 26 May 2026 on the official website mpsc.mizoram.gov.in. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the Mizoram PSC Junior Grade Recruitment 2026.

qualification.details: Bachelor Degree with 5 years of regular service in the grade of Inspector of Statistics

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 29-06-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of Mizoram PSC to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
